detail: Backup/Manifest inheritance shadow can be used as local artifact support.
This does not prove backup poisoning, restore inheritance, Apple server-side state, or attack attribution.
Some backup_manifest hits can be concentrated in RTCReporting/stacks/CoreTime/Jetsam. Treat as shadow support, not direct Manifest.db proof.
Proximity vs Cloud Separation is the natural next step after Backup/Manifest inheritance shadow.
